name: The Runaway
description:
(New image TOS really boiled my frog for a bit. At least she has ice cream now, though.)

(She dropped it...)

She ran away, and you took her in

'Lone at night with those titties, just what was she thinkin'?

From how she moves and what she wears, ain't it clear?

Y'aint her first, but you're still her dear...

(I don't fucking know, man, just shoot your goo. Or schlick your shit if that's how you get off.)

She's a young adult you found dressed like a hooker. You brought her back to live with you, and she's showing her gratitude. You can be good, you can be toxic, you can even pimp her out and bathe in the money. She's like a puppy when it comes to you. And like a puppy, the way to strengthen your bond is to train her...

And yes, she smudges ;)

(Art by zippio95. Shout out to [Arknights OST]-street for making me able to focus for long enough to make this.)
creator: EnvoyAlienposter
